subcodes.first_line: In My Name, the Wronged One, in lands whose soil God hath blessed, but whose people He hath cursed in the Books He sent down aforetime unto His Prophets and Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمی المظلوم فی دیار  بارک الله ارضها و لعن اهلها فی کتب  انزلها من قبل علی النبیین و المرسلین
